observations: Admin full sync pushed new todo_items and calculation_history rows successfully with 0 errors.

Admin form save created form_responses/4ea459a2-6d2b-4e00-99c5-733465fbf853 with form_type mdot_0582b for entry 4b4b6cc9-0747-47c1-8118-216caf5f6b62, and inspector sync pulled it into the Forms screen.
S07 spot-check update coverage completed for todo_items: todo 76e7366e-6244-4723-bcfb-39f74a84fe4e updated to 'VRF-Check rebar spacing 4c6ho [done]' in Supabase and on the inspector device.
Entry PDF preview opened successfully on Android, but the rendered report showed mismapped values/field placement. Filed as #210.
Project 642909d6-7c0b-4d3a-bda1-084f915f705e was remotely deleted from admin; Supabase verifyCascadeDelete passed and both devices dropped the project after refresh/sync.
Inspector sync removed the deleted project locally but never showed deletion_notification_banner. Filed as #211.

S10 unassignment coverage passed: project 57241ac2-95c2-435a-aeb9-cb68050da127 became visible on the inspector when assigned, disappeared after its project_assignments row was soft-deleted, and was then remotely deleted for cleanup.
Inspector full sync repeatedly logged integrity failures for form_exports, entry_exports, and documents and cleared cursors across many tables. Filed as #204.
Realtime hint channel registration repeatedly failed because register_sync_hint_channel and deactivate_sync_hint_channel RPCs were missing. Filed as #205.
After photo sync, the inspector report route /report/4b4b6cc9-0747-47c1-8118-216caf5f6b62 got stuck on Loading and logged a Null-to-String cast error. Filed as #206.
Both admin and inspector sometimes required backing out of a nested dashboard stack before bottom-nav taps to Settings would actually change routes.
On the inspector settings screen, settings_sync_button disappears while sync is running and returns after completion; only the first tap should be treated as authoritative for log capture.

The inspector Forms screen rendered the synced mdot_0582b row visually, but the expected saved_0582b_<responseId> and form_response_open_button_<responseId> testing keys were not exposed in the live tree during this run.
S09 uses a newer delete-sheet plus project_remote_delete_dialog_confirm flow, not the older keyed two-step text-confirm flow described in the sync spec.
Final VRF sweep showed both test projects present only as soft-deleted rows with non-null deleted_at timestamps.

S11 document sync passed on the data path: document 85a4812d-cc96-486d-8554-3616044c4419 existed in Supabase with remote_path and the uploaded file existed in entry-documents storage for entry 3014bdef-6630-42ce-bb1a-22cbb6856468.

Inspector report route /report/3014bdef-6630-42ce-bb1a-22cbb6856468 does not expose document attachment UI keys; the live tree only showed report_attachments_section with report_add_photo_button, so S11 UI verification was recorded as an observation per spec rather than a failure.

S13 foreground realtime verification failed: after admin pushed daily_entries/3014bdef-6630-42ce-bb1a-22cbb6856468 with activities text '[auto1]', the inspector remained stale on the report route until a manual sync was run. Filed as #212.

S12 resume quick-sync verification failed on Android: a peer device pushed activities text '[auto3]', Android was backgrounded briefly and resumed, logs showed 'App resumed, triggering quick sync' followed by 'Quick sync: no dirty scopes or tracker unavailable', and the Android report stayed stale on '[auto2]'. Filed as #224.

S15 passed on both roles: Dashboard and Calendar exposed the global sync_progress_spinner full-sync affordance, and Settings exposed settings_sync_dashboard_tile plus sync_now_full_button. Product intent is that the app-bar icon runs a full sync from anywhere.

S18 private-channel verification failed at the backend layer: sync logs still showed register_sync_hint_channel schema-cache failures, and direct REST access to sync_hint_subscriptions returned PGRST205 because the table was not present in the schema cache. This remains covered by #205.

S19 rebind verification failed on the inspector device: after sign-out/sign-in, logs showed RealtimeHintHandler rebinding plus another register_sync_hint_channel schema-cache failure, and a fresh admin sync changing activities to '[auto2]' left the inspector stale on '[auto1]' until manual sync. Covered by #205 and #212.

S14 and S17 still require deeper background/OS control than the current cross-device harness provides. S16 is presently blocked by the broken hint/private-channel path captured in #205, #212, and #224.
